options.1: The geographical extent of Laterite soils in Andhra Pradesh is very limited.
options.2: Laterites are formed in semi arid and low rainfall regions.
options.3: Laterites are less fertile and appear red and yellowish red.
options.4: Laterites can be used to grow Mango, Cashewnut orchards.

Consider the following statements :
I. The monsoons are primary winds.
II. The monsoons are confined only to the tropical lands lying between 20°N and 20°S.
III. Distribution of rainfall received from the South-West monsoons is governed mainly by the relief of the country.
Which of the above statements are correct ?
